body.title: [escalated] Consequence check: model alternatives classifier
body.intention: I intend that any unintended effects of adding model_not_found classification and alternatives ranking are observed and documented.
body.description:
**What changed:** ModelAlternativesClassifier added; Source._classify_ping_failure() now returns dict with alternatives field; subclass ping() except blocks call the extended _classify_ping_failure().
**Predicted unintended effects:**
- Latency spike in failure path: list_models() calls on every model 404; if provider API is slow or down, it blocks the except branch.
- Ranking fail-open: if alternatives ranking logic crashes (missing token_window on model metadata, malformed response), exception masking could hide the actual error.
- Empty alternatives spam: logging alternatives=[] on every model_not_found could fill logs if a model is persistently unavailable.
- Provider API drift: if a provider changes their /models endpoint format, alternatives extraction silently returns empty list; no alerting.
**Signals to watch:** inference log volume before/after; latency of Source.ping() calls when model endpoint returns 404; whether alternatives lists are non-empty when they should be (spot check a few logs); any new exceptions in datacenter_logs/inference/.
**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-26 or after first DS run following deploy.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Test plan:** no tests — this is an observation ticket
